title: Ward 1908 - Confrontation Protocol Beat Transition
prompt: Story: Ward 1908 (ward-1908) | Hook: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m. | Subgenre: haunted institution | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Decommissioned hilltop hospital and sub-basement records wing | Villain: The Record Keeper | Villain worldview: Unacknowledged harm repeats until the living pay attention. | Motifs: patient tags, flicker lights, stairwell echoes. negativePrompt: Avoid low frame-rate jitter, avoid compression artifacts, avoid incoherent camera cuts, avoid on-screen logos/watermarks.
